---
title: "Network Analysis"
---

The final repository provides reproducible prioritized network tables and simple R validation plots for the manuscript-aligned IL-4/IL-13 ceRNA workflow.

Treatment-specific networks include nominal-discovery downregulated miRNAs, nominal-discovery upregulated mRNAs, nominal-discovery upregulated circRNAs, and curated miRanda-supported miRNA-target edges from the revised integrated ceRNA network source.

Focused table sizes:

- IL-4 network table: 26 edges and 17 nodes.
- IL-13 network table: 7 edges and 7 nodes.
- Strict shared table: 5 unique edges represented with treatment-specific evidence rows.

These counts are not complete treatment-wide network sizes. De novo transcriptome-wide miRanda rerun is outside the scope of this release.

Mature miRNA query FASTA files are validated to use U rather than T bases before miRanda run metadata tables are written.
